title: 相手が誰でも負けないんだから！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I head to the library to do some research, when...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This book must have it... It's the official study
guide for the exams after all...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah, here it is. Okay, now to...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: So, it is superstring theory... However, I have no way to test it...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Looks like Tachyon is also studying for the test.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are all those books hers? That's so much
reading for one person.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, they don't call her a genius for nothing. But
I'm no one to sneeze at either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet's stack of finished books grows and
grows, as if she's competing with Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I can't keep my eyes open... And my head
feels like it's going to explode...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon's pile is up to the ceiling, yet she looks
completely fine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Mine is barely past my head and I'm already
tired... How embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Heh, I see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Type 0 string theory, huh? How curious.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh. Tachyon already left.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And she didn't even put back her books? Looks
like I'll have to do it, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Current Status of Unified Field Theory and Quantum Entanglement and Observation... And this one's Applications of Quantum Field Theory?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There's no way any of these will be on the test...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And here I got all worked up for nothing. I really need to stop—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oops... I knocked them over. I need to tidy this
mess up...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. What the heck are all these formulas? Are
these even words?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't make heads or tails of any of this. I can't
believe she reads such difficult stuff.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's not on the test, the fact that she can
read books and books of it is...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I can't get left behind! I need to study
even more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet goes back to studying, devouring
more study guides and reference books until just
before closing time.
